name: The Focus Group
image_sign_text: REAL PEOPLE. REAL OPINIONS. REAL SNACKS.
effect: Convene eight strangers in a beige room and narrate their responses into strategic direction. This card is considered research.

clauses.name: CONFIRMATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the group's responses match the pre-existing hypothesis: The hypothesis is considered validated.

clauses.name: OUTLIER OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a participant disagrees: That participant is considered an outlier and is excluded from the summary.

clauses.name: MANDATE EFFECT
clauses.rule: When findings are presented to leadership: The findings are considered a mandate from the customer.

witness_quote: The data really backs us up here.
